upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAhiRoccandrasaNkASAn kupitAniva tAn hayAn' (BA॰vi॰57.4) prAhiRot=prAcodayat prAjat
'KaqgaM sahadevAya prAhiRot' (BA॰Salya॰28.38) Kaqgena sahadeve prAharadityarTaH
'vizadigDamizuM prAhiRot' (tantrA॰2.3) prAsyadityarTaH
'bfhaspateraYjaliM prAhiRotsaH' (BA॰ASva॰9.22)
'te'kftArTaM prahiRvanti prARA rAyaH sutAdayaH' (BA॰pu॰10.49.23) vihAya gacCantIti vivakzati kaviH tadasya svAtantryam
'vegena prahitaM bAhuM nijagrAha hasanniva' (BA॰Adi॰153.39) prahitamutkziptam
'yAtuDAnA hetI rakzAMsi prahetiH' (vA॰saM॰15.16) prakfzwA hetiH prahetiH yasminnastre mukte rAvaRaseneva parasparaM ripavo Gnanti sA prahetiH prahetirbARaprAsAdi praharamiti kaScit
'tatastAM prahitAM devImindrARIM sA samanvagAt' (BA॰u॰14.5) prahitA=prasTitA hi gatO vfdDO ceti prAkfte'rTe prayogaH anyatrAntarBUtaRyarTako hinotiH prayukto dfSyate
'prahIyamARaH pravaraSca vAdikEH' (rA॰2.16.46) preryamARa ityAha rAma iti kartfpadamuddeSyam
'Binatti samyak prahito BedaH sTiramatInapi' (tantrA॰1.12.129) prahitaH prayuktaH praRItaH
'ahaM hi satataM gozu BavatAM prahitaH purA' (BA॰vi॰3.10) prahito'DikftaH
'prahito'Svo'Svatara upatizWati' (jE0 brA0 138) prahitaH prAjitaH

'iyamadya niSA pUrvA sOmitre prahitA vanam vanavAsasya…' (rA0 2462).. prahitA gataprAyeti govindarAjaH evaM vanamityananvayaM tizWati vanaM prahitA vane prApteti rAmAnujIyaM vyAKyAnam evamapi vanamiti dvitIyA nopapattimatI Bavati ahaM tu manye vanaM prahitA vayam iti maDyevAkyamavAntaravAkyaM prakziptam iti
'ita UtI vo ajaraM prahetAramaprahitam ASuM jetAraM hetAraM raTItamam…' (aTarva0 201053).. prahetAram prerayitAram aprahitam anyenApreritam

'BaktiM parAM Bagavati pratilaBya kAmaM hfdrogamASvapahinotyacireRa DIraH' (BA॰pu॰10.33.40) apahinoti=apagamayati apapUrvasya hinoteratrEva prayogaH fziriva niyogaparyanuyogAnarhaH svatantra eza kaviH
'asmA idu stomaM saMhinomi' (f0 1614 aTarva0 20354)
'tatra tvaM mama nEvAsi rAmaSca vanamAhitaH' (rA0 26125) vanamAhito vanaM prahitaH vanaM prasTApitaH
'Ayuryatte atihitaM parAcEH' (aTarva0 7553) parAcEratihitaM parAN atigatam
'pratyak pratiprahiRmo yaTA kftyAkftaM hanat' (aTarva0 1015) atra pratiSabdasya pratyakCabdena gatArTatA nAtitirohitA anyatrApi cCandasyevaMviDA SElI dfSyate
'aTemenaM pra hiRutAt pitF~ rupa' (aTarva0 1824) upa prahiRutAt samIpe prezayetyAha
'tadDa sma SrotriyAyopa prahitya' (jE0 brA0 255) ukto'rTaH
'puraM didfkzuBi rjAnapadErupAhitEH' (rA0 2628) upAhitEH sametEH
